title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everything that happens from now on is real.
That's why I have to make sure to witness it with
my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll create striking memories for myself—for
everyone! And I'll make each and every moment
shine brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion doesn't finish her sentence, but it's
enough. I understand exactly what she's feeling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day it was decided she would run in the
Twinkle Series, Fine Motion's eyes sparkled
brightly, and her excitement for the future
swelled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she heads towards her glorious finale, she
looks more beautiful than I can ever remember
seeing her.
choice_data_list: Go out there and have fun!
Go out there and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to stop you there. Please save the
"Today is an auspicious day!" formalities.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There's only one thing I want to know, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do you have the determination to face the
Empress on this honorable stage?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course, Air Groove. Now, today is an auspicious day. And, from the bottom of my heart...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm honored for the chance to compete against
you in a race you hold in such high esteem.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Very well. Do you require an escort?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I can find my way. To the starting line and right
past you to the finish!
